remediation_advice: No security issues detected. The diff contains metadata updates to `.forge-meta/` JSON files and a new shell script (`scripts/forge-update.sh`) embedded as a JSON content field. The shell script uses `set -euo pipefail`, does not accept user input, does not execute arbitrary commands, and only runs hardcoded `git` operations against `origin main`. No secrets, injection vectors, insecure patterns, or sensitive file additions were found.
